summary: Verified PDF header overlap fix for contracts CTR-2026-0003 and CTR-2026-0005 via 5 pytest cases hitting the live /api/contracts/{id}/pdf endpoint. All 5 tests passed. The old long label 'Empréstimu (Orij → Atuál)' has been fully replaced by the short label 'Montante Empréstimu' in the header table. Values are readable and correctly formatted, including the arrow-style '$3,000.00 → $1,000.00' for partial-payment contracts. Article 2 shows both amounts, and Article 8 penalty on CTR-2026-0005 is $100.00 (10% of current $1,000 principal) as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: pdf_utils.py is 1860 lines — could be split into header/articles/finance-summary modules for maintainability, but not blocking.
Header col widths 4.0/4.8/4.0/4.2cm = 17.0cm total, safely inside standard A4 usable width (~17.6cm at 1.8cm margins). Fix is well-sized.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing CTR-2026-0003 and CTR-2026-0005 seed contracts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter39 regression at /app/backend/tests/test_iter39_pdf_header_overlap.py covers: (1) new short label present in CTR-2026-0003 header, (2) old long label absent, (3) partial-payment arrow value in CTR-2026-0005, (4) Article 8 penalty math on current principal, (5) Article 2 dual-amount display. PDF text extracted with pypdf 6.14. Header now shows 'Montante Empréstimu' with 4.0cm label column / 4.8cm value column.
